script: (function(){ var result = {}; var filterBtn = document.querySelector('div.filter'); if (filterBtn) { var r = filterBtn.getBoundingClientRect(); result.filterBtn = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), text: filterBtn.innerText }; } var dropdowns = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="dropdown"], [class*="Dropdown"], [class*="panel"], [class*="Panel"], [class*="popover"], [class*="Popover"], [class*="filter"]'); result.dropdowns = Array.from(dropdowns).map(function(e){ var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: e.tagName, className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,120), visible: r.width > 0 && r.height > 0, x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), text: (e.innerText||'').substring(0,200).replace(/\n/g,' ') }; }).filter(function(d){ return d.visible && d.h > 50; }); return result; })()
